_comment: Example only — paste values into secrets/env operatorside; never commit real URLs or API keys.

local_gpu_workstation.description: ComfyUI running on a local NVIDIA GeForce workstation
local_gpu_workstation.connection: same LAN hostname, localhost (only if ham-api co-hosted), Tailscale/Zerotier tailnet hostname, SSH tunnel ingress to API host — values go in env not git
local_gpu_workstation.notes: Do not expose Comfy raw HTTP to the public internet

dedicated_gpu_vm.connection: VPC private hostname, authenticated reverse proxy — values in env/secrets only

runpod_vast_beam_worker.connection: Provider endpoint typically behind Bearer or bespoke gateway headers

managed_comfy_cloud_worker.connection: Provider API base URL in env only; verify HTTP contract vs stock Comfy
managed_comfy_cloud_worker.recommended_for: lower ops overhead once contract matches adapter
